---
title: "Laura Palmer"
---

## Laura Palmer

**Dates:** (d.1885)

**Maiden name:** (Waldegrave)

### Description

wife from 1848 of  Roundell Palmer, created  (1872)  Lord Selborne and (1882) Earl of Selborne.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 13th 1874
- Letter from July 21st 1874

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
